descriptions: Fixed a UI bug where the 'Stand Up' prompt appeared without the player being seated.
Increased AnimPos rotation limit from 90 to 180 degrees for better positioning.
Introduced Framework:canBeInvitedToGroup to filter dead, cuffed, or admin-mode players from group invites.
Added the missing custom_previews folder to the web directory.
General optimization of the group invitation and closest player detection logic.
